prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock price volatility patterns, I estimated a 3-day forecast using assumed daily volatility of approximately 2-3%. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming normal distribution of returns with increasing width for higher confidence levels. Without historical data, I used industry-standard volatility assumptions for healthcare/insurance stocks.
